input.user_input: What is the dispute resolution process described in this agreement? Does it require mediation before arbitration?

actual: I do not see a document attached to your message. Could you please provide or upload the agreement? Once you share it, I can review the dispute resolution clause and tell you exactly what the process entails and whether it requires mediation before arbitration.
